rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
When AGREE reports '<error>' types, trace the first invalid identifier on the same line and resolve it or remove the clause.
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to unresolved references or type errors should be addressed by correcting the root cause in the AGREE annex.
AGREE contracts must only reference visible identifiers or helpers declared in the same annex to avoid '<error>' type issues.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts use binary expressions with '=>' where both sides must be of type 'bool'.
Annex blocks in AADL are used to define component type assumptions/guarantees and implementation bindings.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics; instead, resolve references or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and insertion location decisions
